hero.description: End-to-end encrypted messaging with a tactile, industrial design. No phone numbers. No trackers. Just you and your data.

why.title: WHY NYX?
why.desc_1: Tired of complicated sign-ups and mandatory app downloads? NYX is your solution. Access it instantly from your favorite browser—no installation needed.
why.desc_2: Worried about your data? We are too. NYX is built on a foundation of privacy, acting only as a secure bridge between you and your contacts.

no_phone.title: NO PHONE NUMBER
no_phone.desc: Sign up with just a Username. Your real identity stays safe. No one can 'save your contact' without permission.

ghost_app.title: GHOST APP (PWA)
ghost_app.desc: Zero install. Open in browser, chat, close tab, and clear data. Zero forensic footprint left on your device.

argon2.title: ARGON2 SECURITY
argon2.desc: The only web chat that turns your password into a military-grade encryption key using memory-hardened hashing.

tactile.title: TACTILE DESIGN
tactile.desc: A mutated neumorphic interface with chiseled depth and grain texture for a premium physical feel.

step_1.title: 1. CREATE ACCOUNT
step_1.desc: Sign up via username. We automatically generate your 24-word recovery phrase for encryption.

step_2.title: 2. START CHATTING
step_2.desc: Your messages are end-to-end encrypted from the very first word using the Signal Protocol.

step_3.title: 3. VANISH
step_3.desc: Done? Close the browser. Encryption keys are wiped from memory. No trace left behind.

testimonials.title: TRUSTED BY PRIVACY ADVOCATES
testimonials.yosep: Finally, a chat app that respects my privacy without sacrificing a beautiful user experience. The fact that I control my own keys is a game-changer.
testimonials.sarah: Nyx has become essential for our team. It's simple, secure, and a pleasure to use every day.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.a1: Yes. We use the Signal Protocol (X3DH + Double Ratchet Algorithm) to ensure that only you and the person you're communicating with can read what's sent. Not even the server can decrypt your messages.
faq.q2: Do I need to install an app?
faq.a2: No. NYX is a Progressive Web App (PWA). You can use it directly in your browser or install it to your home screen for a native-like experience without the app store friction.
faq.a3: Yes, NYX is open-source and free to use. There are no hidden fees, ads, or data tracking.
faq.q4: How do I recover my account?
faq.a4: When you sign up, you receive a 24-word recovery phrase. This is the ONLY way to restore your account, but remember that you cannot access your messages history. And we do not store this phrase.

cta.title: TAKE BACK YOUR PRIVACY.
cta.desc: Don't let your data become a commodity. Switch to NYX today. Free, Open Source, Forever.

Any architectural comparisons are made strictly for informational and cryptographic review purposes based on public technical documentation available as of {{year}}.
